Hero.aboutDescription: At Omran Tech, we are not just developers; we are your technological partners in developing and creating professional websites and e-commerce stores. Our team includes an elite group of over 20 specialized software engineers. We guarantee secure, reliable, and carefully tested websites, coded entirely from scratch to meet your exact needs, far from ready-made and pre-assembled templates.

drawer.impactTitle: How do we multiply your sales?

ecommerce.title: Professional E-Commerce Stores
ecommerce.impact: An e-commerce store is not just a storefront; it's a salesman working 24/7 without stopping. Our statistics show that moving your business online with optimized User Experience (UX) increases sales by up to 120% in the first quarter, by targeting a wider audience and streamlining the checkout process.
extendedFeatures: Conversion Rate Optimized (CRO) interface to boost sales
Advanced integration with payment gateways (Visa, Mastercard, Mada)
Automatic integration with shipping and delivery companies
Smart inventory management system that alerts you on low stock
Dashboard providing comprehensive analytical reports for your store's performance
ecommerce.successQuote: After launching our store with Omran Tech, our sales tripled in the first two months, and managing orders and inventory became much easier than before.

restaurants.title: Restaurants and Cafes Websites
restaurants.impact: Customers eat with their eyes first. A professional restaurant website provides an appetizing menu exploration experience and facilitates direct booking and ordering without middlemen or high-commission apps, raising your profit margin by up to 30%.
extendedFeatures: Interactive digital menu with high-quality images of dishes
Smart table reservation system with automatic customer confirmation
Direct delivery and pickup order reception with zero commissions
Search Engine Optimization (Local SEO) for your restaurant's visibility on Google
Dashboard to manage orders and update menu/prices in seconds
restaurants.successQuote: We got rid of the high commissions from delivery apps. Now, over 60% of our orders come directly through our private website designed by Omran Tech.

corporate.title: Companies and Institutions Websites
corporate.impact: Your company's website is its digital headquarters reflecting its size and strength. An institutional website design enhances your credibility with clients and investors, making it easier for them to access your services and contact you, significantly increasing your chances of closing B2B deals.
extendedFeatures: Design that luxuriously reflects the company's visual identity
Detailed pages for services and previous work (Portfolio)
Advanced contact forms to collect potential client leads
Website integration with analytical tools (Google Analytics)
Highly secure software architecture (SSL) and full responsiveness across all screens
corporate.successQuote: The website gave us a professional front for government tenders and major clients. Our digital presence now truly reflects the quality of our on-ground execution.

ecommerce.desc: A fully integrated store ready to sell your products and receive payments from day one. Designed to boost your sales and make purchasing easy for your customers.
